A Brand Activism Guide To:

How to Develop your Brand Activism Plan.

Developing a brand activism plan is a strategic process that aligns your brand with social, environmental, or political causes, building deeper connections with your audience and contributing positively to society. Here’s our step-by-step guide to help you navigate this journey:

 

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" module_alignment="center" custom_padding="5%||3%||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="18px" header_3_text_color="#4dd9ff" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="||10px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Step 1:

Understand Brand Activism

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Defining Brand Activism

Brand activism consists of purposeful actions by companies to address fundamental concerns that reflect society's urgent problems, such as environmental or societal changes.

If your brand or business is playing a significant role in driving social, political, economic, or environmental change or taking a ‘direct’ and ‘disruptive’ approach to influencing policy and legislation beyond advocacy, then it is engaging in brand activism. By taking a stand on a pressing issue (or issues), businesses can add a new facet to their brand mission and influence consumer preferences and purchasing decisions.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/The-body-shop.png" title_text="The body shop" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="40px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/the-body-shop-ad.png" title_text="the body shop ad" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="60px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="30px" text_line_height="1.3em" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="30px" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_5_line_height="2em" background_color="#ff08cc" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="0px|-100px|0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="0px||||false|false" custom_margin_phone="0px||||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="60px|60px|50px|60px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="50px|50px|50px|50px|true|true" custom_padding_phone="50px|30px|50px|30px|true|true" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" header_2_font_size_tablet="28px" header_2_font_size_phone="25px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

“Those who stand for nothing, fall for everything”

Alexander Hamilton
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="40px||||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Historical Context

One of the first companies to publicly declare that driving positive change in the world was as important as making a profit was The Body Shop.

Founded in Brighton, England in 1976 by Anita Roddick, The Body Shop was a pioneer in cruelty-free and environmentally friendly cosmetics. Under Roddick's leadership, the company boldly aligned itself with significant social and environmental causes and body positivity.

Their key campaigns and achievements include:

  • Partnering with Greenpeace in 1986 for the Save the Whale campaign to end whale hunting.
  • Launching a 1989 petition to halt the burning of Brazilian rainforests.
  • Advocating for the Ogoni People and campaigning against animal testing.
  • Promoting renewable energy and raising funds for victims of domestic violence.
  • Creating the Get Lippy campaign to support those living with HIV/AIDS.
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/greenpeace.png" title_text="greenpeace" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="40px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="10px||||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

But perhaps its greatest success was a collaboration with ECPAT International to fight child trafficking, resulting in 24 countries adopting new legislation.  The company’s unwavering commitment to human and animal rights, along with environmental sustainability, has built a fiercely loyal customer base over the years. Customers deeply value the alignment of their own beliefs with the brand’s mission, often willing to pay premium prices knowing their money supports meaningful causes.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_4_line_height="1.2em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="0px||20px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="" custom_margin_phone="" custom_margin_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#262626" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="||||false|false" custom_padding="30px||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="" custom_padding_phone="35px||0px||false|false" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" border_color_bottom="#000000" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" module_alignment="center" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" admin_label="Text" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="30px||30px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Contemporary Relevance

Ben & Jerry’s has also long funded and built relationships with civil rights leaders, giving the company a credible platform to use its voice and be heard. And like The Body Shop and Ben & Jerry's, activist brands such as Vega, Patagonia, and Tony’s Chocolonely have successfully embraced activism because social issues or environmental reform are the higher purpose at the heart of their brand.

In a world facing socially regressive policies driven out of political and religious division, brand activism offers companies seeking to be agents of change an avenue to directly engage in meaningful demonstration and solutions. Kantar's 2020 report found that 54% of consumers now expect brands to take an active role in social conversations about issues like #MeToo and racial injustices, with consumers also demanding meaningful action rather than empty solidarity.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/vote-the.jpg" title_text="vote-the" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/BandJ.png" title_text="BandJ" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="0px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="left" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" use_custom_gutter="on" specialty="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.16" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="15.5px" text_line_height="1.5em" header_font="|700|||||||" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#4dd9ff" background_layout="dark" custom_margin_tablet="" custom_margin_phone="" custom_margin_last_edited="on|tablet" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Step 2:

Recognize the Business Benefits of Brand Activism

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="0px||||false|false" custom_padding="0px||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

“By choosing brands that align with their values, shoppers are voting with their wallets for the kinds of businesses they want in the world and paving the way toward a more sustainable and just economy. We’re in an unfortunate time where governments and institutions provide less and less moral leadership and we now expect to see it from the brands we buy.”

From ‘B the Change‘: A collaboration of B Lab, the B Corp community, and the movement of people using business as a force for good.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/chnage-the-mascot.jpg" title_text="chnage-the-mascot" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_padding="||3%||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Aligning with Consumer Values & Enhancing Brand Image

Brands that have either been established with a higher purpose at their core, or those that have naturally evolved beyond corporate social responsibility to become values-driven companies, attract customers whose values align with their own and can more credibly and authentically take an ‘activist’ stance on issues that they and their consumers care about.

Businesses that align their efforts with the same values as their audience not only build trust and equity but also gain long-term public support for their initiatives.

This economic activism on the part of consumers elevates the purchase of everyday items and services from simple commercial transactions to an important expression of their moral code.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Driving Social Impact

The depth of feeling that pushes people to the streets to protest a political issue or into the courtrooms in an attempt to achieve improvements in society should not be ignored or underestimated.

Activism that addresses environmental change or societal challenges can act as a catalyst for public support and foster long-term loyalty from values-driven consumers.

If the engine of commerce, fueled by social innovation and kept in check by an ever more conscious consumer, can create sustainable, scalable solutions for what the world needs and what people want, then brands can (and ostensibly should) become the most powerful instruments for change the world has ever seen!

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="#000000" use_background_color_gradient="on" background_color_gradient_direction="110deg" background_color_gradient_stops="rgba(0,0,0,0.23) 0%|rgba(0,0,0,0.52) 100%" background_color_gradient_start="rgba(0,0,0,0.23)" background_color_gradient_end="rgba(0,0,0,0.52)" min_height_tablet="" min_height_phone="" min_height_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_padding="20px||20px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="20px||40px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="20px||40px||false|false" z_index_tablet="500" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" module_alignment="center" custom_padding="2%||2%||true|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" admin_label="text" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="18px" header_3_text_color="#4dd9ff" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="||1px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Step 3.

Define Your Brand’s Purpose and Values

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_font="|700|||||||" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Define your Purpose

For companies seeking to address political issues or societal changes, understanding the intersection of their mission with urgent problems facing society is essential to crafting an authentic message.

A good place to start is to draw a simple Venn diagram and then find the intersection between your mission (your brand purpose)  the money (biggest consumer barrier) and the magic (the issue or cultural challenge that you want to address.)

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_line_height="1.2em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="0px||20px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="" custom_margin_phone="" custom_margin_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Build your own brand activism plan and create a flywheel of impact, using this handy one pager as a guide.

Authenticity in Activism

Corporate-driven initiatives that fail to align with a brand’s core mission and values risk appearing as marketing-driven stunts that impede improvements, damage brand equity, trust and reputation  instead of creating meaningful change.  

In April 2023, Bud Light tried collaborating with transgender influencer Dylan Mulvaney on a social media promotional post. This sparked backlash from several prominent conservatives, leading many conservative figures and groups to call for a boycott of Bud Light. Bud Light lost  $1.4 billion.in U.S. beer sales and AB InBev lost over $27 billion in value following the controversy. They saw their U.S. market share slashed by half, largely fueled by U.S. retailers reducing shelf space for the brand.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/bud-light.png" title_text="bud light" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/byd-sales.png" title_text="byd sales" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_font="|700|||||||" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="10px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Activism isn’t meant to be impulsive, reactionary or commercially destructive, but fear of change, misplaced sentiment  (or a clash of values) can sometimes drive individuals against brands and corporations that take a stand – if that position isn’t authentically connected to their purpose.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_font="|700|||||||" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="0px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Engaging Stakeholders

The Bud Light fiasco is a great example of failure to understand the brand’s key stakeholders (in this case, their core consumer base.) Before taking a stand, think about the entire ecosystem of stakeholders, how they are connected (or not!), and where the biggest intention/action gaps are. Listen, learn, and seek to understand differing points of view and then (and only then) see if it’s possible to complete that Venn diagram and find some common ground.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="#000000" use_background_color_gradient="on" background_color_gradient_direction="110deg" background_color_gradient_stops="rgba(0,0,0,0.23) 0%|rgba(0,0,0,0.52) 100%" background_color_gradient_start="rgba(0,0,0,0.23)" background_color_gradient_end="rgba(0,0,0,0.52)" min_height_tablet="" min_height_phone="" min_height_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_padding="|0px|0%|0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="20px||40px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="20px||40px||false|false" z_index_tablet="500" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_4,1_4" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_size="initial" background_position="top_left" background_repeat="repeat" max_width="100%" module_alignment="center" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_padding="0px||3%||false|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" admin_label="Text" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="||||false|false" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="18px" header_3_text_color="#4dd9ff" header_3_line_height="1.2em" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="||1px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Step 4:

Measure Your Impact and Adapt

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_font="|700|||||||" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Monitoring and Evaluation

Engaging in brand activism should always be driven by a moral compulsion rather than a commercial challenge. Taking a stance based on fear of failure, relevance or retribution alone does not pay off. There’s a big difference between an existential fear of standing by and not doing anything to change the status quo and then fear of doing something—anything—just in case you get found out.

To ensure your efforts remain impactful, you can go back to that Venn diagram and measure the three most important dimensions of your activist stance and brand strategy.  How well do your key stakeholders understand and jive with your mission?  Have you managed to overcome the biggest intention-action gaps? and are you having a transformative impact on the lived experience of the core community that you serve?  Measure each (all can be done with a simple survey) and notice any shifts across each of these dimensions.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||20px|false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_color_left="gcid-primary-color" border_style_left="dotted" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_left%22%93}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/gaia-face-faded.jpg" title_text="gaia-face-faded" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" module_alignment="center" width_phone="70%" width_last_edited="on|phone"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="||||false|false" text_font_size="15.5px" text_line_height="1.5em" header_3_line_height="1.3em" header_4_font="||||||||" header_4_font_size="17px" header_4_line_height="1.3em" background_color="gcid-secondary-color" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="40px|20px|40px|20px|false|true" link_option_url="https://junkkouture.com/" link_option_url_new_window="on" hover_enabled="0" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-secondary-color%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding_phone="|0px||0px|false|true" sticky_enabled="0" custom_padding_tablet="40px|20px|40px|20px|false|true"]

Gathering Feedback

Analyze the responses you get from your audience and stakeholders against these three dimensions and you’ll find that you have both a strategy and a compass to help you navigate through the challenges and understand Whether your cause and commitment is transforming your purpose into profit.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#ff08cc" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="15.5px" text_line_height="1.5em" header_3_line_height="1.3em" header_4_font="||||||||" header_4_font_size="17px" header_4_line_height="1.3em" background_color="gcid-secondary-color" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="40px|20px|40px|20px|false|true" link_option_url="https://grounded.world/project/plan-international/" link_option_url_new_window="on" hover_enabled="0" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-secondary-color%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding_phone="10px|0px||0px|false|true" sticky_enabled="0" custom_padding_tablet="40px|20px|40px|20px|false|true"]

Continuous Improvement

Be prepared to adapt your strategies based on your ‘flywheel of impact’ and make sure you stay up to speed with the changing political, economic, social, technological,  legal, and environmental (PESTLE) dynamics at play.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="#262626" global_colors_info="{}"]

Step 5.

Understand What a Brand Activism Agency Can Do for Your Brand

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_4_font="|700|||||||" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px||||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" z_index_tablet="500" text_text_align="left" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Partnering with a brand activism agency like grounded can help you understand the culture, context, and societal issues that your brand purpose can best help support and activate. Undertaking landscape assessments, stakeholder ecosystem mapping, intention/action gap analysis through to purpose articulation, campaign development, strategic partnerships, and measurement can all help you make sure you’re crystal clear on what you stand for, before taking a stand. 

To find out more about our approach – simply roll over the tiles below.

About Grounded

item.title: PODCAST
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width="100%" max_width="100%" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/ISTH-cover-final-landscape.jpg" title_text="ISTH-cover-final" src_tablet="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/ISTH-cover-final.jpg" src_phone="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/ISTH-cover-final.jpg" src_last_edited="on|tablet" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" src__hover_enabled="off|desktop"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" background_size="contain" background_position="top_right" custom_padding="70px||50px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="80px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font_size="30px" header_2_line_height="1.3em" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The podcast for people who know that responsible business is messy, meaningful, and probably much harder than it should be!

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width_tablet="80%" width_phone="80%" width_last_edited="on|tablet" module_alignment="center" module_alignment_tablet="center" module_alignment_phone="center" module_alignment_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="|0%|||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="|0%|||false|false" custom_padding_phone="|0%|||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="18px" text_line_height="30px" custom_margin="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||60px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="18px" text_font_size_phone="16px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

In each episode, grounded co-founders, Heidi Schoeneck and Phil White sit down with founders, corporate changemakers, sustainability leaders, social entrepreneurs, and thought leaders who’ve been there and are doing it. Our fearless founders will get into the honest conversations most people avoid — about power, profit, fear, failure, purpose, and the many barriers and obstacles that often frustrate progress.

With a little help from Gaia, grounded’s AI sidekick, they will  poke at the uncomfortable questions and unpack the messy middle. And to wrap it up?

The show will bubble up insights from behavioral science and spirituality (so we get unique perspectives from both sides of the conscious leadership coin).

[/et_pb_text][dipl_facebook_embedded_video _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/dipl_facebook_embedded_video][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_video src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tPaXVOrq_YY" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_video][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" background_size="contain" background_position="top_right" custom_padding="40px||40px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="80px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="18px" text_line_height="30px" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||60px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="18px" text_font_size_phone="16px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Apply to Be a Guest!

Maybe you've been there. You took the leap. You built the business. You challenged the status quo. And you’ve got the scars (and wisdom) to prove it?

Or you’re right in it. Pushing for real change inside a legacy company. Trying to shift systems that don’t want to budge. Frustrated by the gap between good intentions and real outcomes.

Or you’ve lived it. The consequences. The costs. The personal experiences that make this work urgent and deeply human.

If any of this  sounds like you — we want to hear all about your war stories, your wisdom, and your wipe-outs! Just leave your email and LinkedIn profile below and a member of the team will be in touch!

It's time to get grounded

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
The podcast for people who know that responsible business is messy, meaningful, and probably much harder than it should be!
In each episode, grounded co-founders, Heidi Schoeneck and Phil White sit down with founders, corporate changemakers, sustainability leaders, social entrepreneurs, and thought leaders who’ve been there and are doing it. Our fearless founders will get into the honest conversations most people avoid — about power, profit, fear, failure, purpose, and the many barriers and obstacles that often frustrate progress.
With a little help from Gaia, grounded’s AI sidekick, they will  poke at the uncomfortable questions and unpack the messy middle. And to wrap it up?
The show will bubble up insights from behavioral science and spirituality (so we get unique perspectives from both sides of the conscious leadership coin).
Apply to Be a Guest!
Maybe you’ve been there. You took the leap. You built the business. You challenged the status quo. And you’ve got the scars (and wisdom) to prove it?
Or you’re right in it. Pushing for real change inside a legacy company. Trying to shift systems that don’t want to budge. Frustrated by the gap between good intentions and real outcomes.
Or you’ve lived it. The consequences. The costs. The personal experiences that make this work urgent and deeply human.
If any of this  sounds like you — we want to hear all about your war stories, your wisdom, and your wipe-outs! Just leave your email and LinkedIn profile below and a member of the team will be in touch!
It’s time to get grounded
Contact Us
It shouldn't be this hard podcast
It Shouldn't Be This Hard Podcast | Grounded World
It Shouldn’t Be This Hard is a podcast by Grounded World, sharing honest stories with changemakers on impact, climate action & storytelling.

Grounded is a B Corp Certified
Boutique Marketing Agency

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url="@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9hdHRhY2htZW50Iiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjExMTExIn19@" url_new_window="on" button_text="Download our Impact Report" _builder_version="4.27.4" _dynamic_attributes="button_url" button_bg_color="#000000" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}" button_bg_enable_color__hover="on" button_bg_color__hover="#ff08cc" button_bg_color__hover_enabled="on|hover" button_border_color__hover="#ff08cc" button_border_color__hover_enabled="on|hover"][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="47px" header_2_line_height="60px" width="100%" custom_margin="||30px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" text_font_size_tablet="48px" text_font_size_phone="" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Big Brand Muscle. Boutique Hustle.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Multi-Award Winning Boutique Marketing Agency

Grounded is a multi-award winning B Corp certified boutique marketing agency with decades of experience in packaging, design, branding, activation, sustainability marketing and social impact. We have helped some of the world’s best known brands, retailers, nonprofits and startups to articulate their purpose, activate their brand and accelerate their impact.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url="@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI0OSJ9fQ==@" url_new_window="on" button_text="View our work" _builder_version="4.27.4" _dynamic_attributes="button_url" _module_preset="default" button_bg_color="#000000" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone" custom_css_main_element_phone="width: 100%!important;||text-align: center;" button_bg_color__hover="#ff08cc" button_border_color__hover="#ff08cc" button_border_color__hover_enabled="on|hover"][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" border_color_left="gcid-primary-color" border_style_left="dotted" border_width_left_tablet="0px" border_width_left_phone="0px" border_width_left_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_left%22%93}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="|||20px|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

We’re An Exponential Organization

Flexible, fluid and fearless, we are a full service agency committed to doing the right thing and doing the right things! We are also a certified Exponential organization (ExO) which means we are designed to operate with the utmost agility, speed and cost efficiency. We can help you scale the impact of your brand or business 10x faster than your competition -  taking  advantage of emerging trends and newly available technologies – all supported by world class strategy, creative and commercial innovation.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" border_color_left="#00AEEF" border_style_left="dotted" border_width_left_tablet="0px" border_width_left_phone="0px" border_width_left_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="|||20px|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

Certified B Corp: A Force for Good

We have been a certified B Corp since our first year of our operation (in 2018) which also means we are committed to continuous improvement and leveraging our business as a force for good. This includes giving back to non profits, investing in startup social enterprises, reducing our carbon emissions against verified Science Based Targets (SBTi), speaking regularly and contributing thought leadership to organizations and communities that advance conscious business and a stakeholder economy while promoting diversity and equity amongst our staff and suppliers. You can download our impact report to find out more.

Meet the Founders

We believe that every business or brand can drive exponential transformation and impact when they are grounded in purpose AND profit. Making money and making a difference aren’t competing forces - because by solving the world's biggest problems, we can also unlock the world's biggest business opportunities.

 So, we left our global network agency life in 2018 and started our own social innovation and boutique marketing agency to  do exactly that.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Grounded is a B Corp Certified
Boutique Marketing Agency

Download our Impact Report

Big Brand Muscle. Boutique Hustle.

Multi-Award Winning Boutique Marketing Agency

Grounded is a multi-award winning B Corp certified boutique marketing agency with decades of experience in packaging, design, branding, activation, sustainability marketing and social impact. We have helped some of the world’s best known brands, retailers, nonprofits and startups to articulate their purpose, activate their brand and accelerate their impact.

View our work

We’re An Exponential Organization

Flexible, fluid and fearless, we are a full service agency committed to doing the right thing and doing the right things! We are also a certified Exponential organization (ExO) which means we are designed to operate with the utmost agility, speed and cost efficiency. We can help you scale the impact of your brand or business 10x faster than your competition –  taking  advantage of emerging trends and newly available technologies – all supported by world class strategy, creative and commercial innovation.

Certified B Corp: A Force for Good

We have been a certified B Corp since our first year of our operation (in 2018) which also means we are committed to continuous improvement and leveraging our business as a force for good. This includes giving back to non profits, investing in startup social enterprises, reducing our carbon emissions against verified Science Based Targets (SBTi), speaking regularly and contributing thought leadership to organizations and communities that advance conscious business and a stakeholder economy while promoting diversity and equity amongst our staff and suppliers. You can download our impact report to find out more.

Meet the Founders

We believe that every business or brand can drive exponential transformation and impact when they are grounded in purpose AND profit. Making money and making a difference aren’t competing forces – because by solving the world’s biggest problems, we can also unlock the world’s biggest business opportunities.

 So, we left our global network agency life in 2018 and started our own social innovation and boutique marketing agency to  do exactly that.

Phil's Bio
Heidi's Bio

For potential projects or engagements, feel free to schedule a call.

Discovery Call

If you’re still unsure, submit a contact form.

A member of the team will get back to you within 24 hours. Sales and solution provider messages are automatically sent to spam.

Contact Form

For any other questions, media enquiries or if you’re interested in joining the team, please email us getgrounded@grounded.world

It’s time to get grounded

Contact Us

_module_preset="default" width="25%" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="||||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="|||0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_font_size_tablet="60px" header_font_size_phone="50px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Transform Purpose Into Profit

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.5em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="20px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="0px|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="19px" text_font_size_phone="17px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="1.5em" text_line_height_phone="1.4em" text_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Connecting the 'Why' of purpose to the 'Way' of profit to create your identity, position your brand, tell your sustainability story and drive innovation

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="15px" text_line_height="1.4em" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.7)" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px|20px|10px|20px|false|true" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5%22:%91%22border_color_all%22%93}"]

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

  • Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
  • Brand positioning architecture & archetyping
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="80px||50px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

1. The BPP

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The BPP is a framework designed to help organizations and brands connect the WHY of purpose to the WAY of profit.  Think of it as a business strategy canvas on a page that can your company or brand to articulate its ‘massive transformative purpose’.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

2. Brand Archetype

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Identity, messaging, content and campaigns all need to be rooted in a character and experience that intuitively positions and differentiates your brand. We use brand archetyping to help reveal the right values, character and TOV.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

3. The 5Rs

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The 5Rs is run as a team workshop to deconstruct your product or brand proposition to decide which functional elements or assets to re-use, reimagine, reduce, remove or re-inforce.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#0a0a0a" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" border_color_top="gcid-primary-color" border_style_top="dotted" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_top%22%93}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_4,1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/abstract-texture-background-plama-2000px.jpg" max_width="100%" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;||" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="|700|||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_2_font="||||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px|30px|false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

The BPP

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_margin="30px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The BPP is a framework designed to help organizations and brands connect the WHY of purpose to the WAY of revenue. Think of it as a business strategy canvas on a page - helping your company to articulate its ‘massive transformative purpose’.

The BPP is published by the ANA Center for Brand Purpose as a best in class approach for articulating corporate, brand and social purpose

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/ana.jpg" title_text="ana" url="https://www.ana.net/miccontent/show/id/kp-2023-07-grounded-media-articulating-brand-purpose" url_new_window="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width="70%" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="12px" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Click Tile to Download the Framework

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|600|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font="|600|||||||" header_3_text_align="left" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="|30px|||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

An example

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/onesite.png" title_text="onesite" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

Belief

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Everyone should have access to affordable eye care. It should no longer be a barrier to human achievement because when the world sees better the world is better 

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

Purpose

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Fuel people’s potential by helping them see more clearly

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

Pursuits

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text ol_position="outside" ol_item_indent="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]
  1. Provide funding, staff, equipment and programming for pop-up clinics and self-sustaining vision centres in underserved communities around the world
  2. Engage and connect Essilor-Luxottica’s employees with volunteer opportunities across 16+ partner organizations
  3. Be a positive force for social change by helping people to appreciate how the power of sight can reduce inequality

header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Brand Archetyping

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="||on||||||" text_text_color="gcid-primary-color" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.4em" custom_margin="20px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93}"]

“In an age in which many people crave a deeper sense of connection to their work and want business to demonstrate greater integrity and accountability, the creative and mindful attention to archetypes can facilitate a more authentic, holistic and human way of being in business.”

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_margin="30px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]
  • Archetypes provide the narrative structure (along with the characteristics) for helping us ‘activate’ the BPP and deliver your desired brand experience.
  • They transcend time, space and culture - helping to ‘position’ the brand (i.e who you are, what you stand for and what we want people to feel as a result of engaging with us). Archetypes help shift from story ‘say’ to story ‘do’ and provide a paradigm for how we want people ‘feel’ and what kind of experience they should have. There are 52 of them - so we’ll find the right one (to help best activate your BPP!)
  • Your backstory and belief statement often provide the strongest archetypal indicator along with the role it can play in delivering your core pursuits!
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/archetypes.jpg" title_text="archetypes" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#0a0a0a" custom_padding="0px||50px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" border_color_top="gcid-primary-color" border_style_top="dotted" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_top%22%93}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_3_font_size="28px" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Case Study: Meaningful Recovery From Addiction

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_margin="30px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

The Alchemist

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/the-alchemist.jpg" title_text="the-alchemist" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

The Employee Advocacy Campaign 

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/10-year-indivior.jpg" title_text="10-year-indivior" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_text_color="gcid-primary-color" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22header_3_text_color%22%93}"]

The Meaning

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The symbolism associated with the alchemist represents energy, compassion, healing and a deep understanding of nature. The geometric mandala acts as a kind of interface between the material world (of elements and substances) and the spiritual world of consciousness and transcendence - quite literally bringing together and unifying elements of mind and body to effect ‘magical’ transformation. This is at the heart of the alchemist…which makes it the perfect guiding force for employee advocacy efforts and the journey from rescue to recovery for those suffering from addiction.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#0a0a0a" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" border_color_top="gcid-primary-color" border_style_top="dotted" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_top%22%93}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/bottle-hanging-narrow.jpg" max_width="100%" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;||" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="|700|||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_2_font="||||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px|30px|false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

The 5Rs

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" module_alignment="center" custom_margin="30px||||false|true" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="width: 20%!important;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone" custom_css_main_element_tablet="width: 40%!important;" custom_css_main_element_phone="width: 100%!important;"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font="|600|||||||" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font_size="28px" header_3_line_height="1.4em" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

RE-USE
RE-IMAGINE
REDUCE
REMOVE
REINFORCE

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="width: 40%!important;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_css_main_element_tablet="width: 60%!important;" custom_css_main_element_phone="width: 100%!important;"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Perrier-image.jpg" title_text="Perrier-image" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width="95%" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="width: 40%!important;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_css_main_element_tablet="width: 100%!important;" custom_css_main_element_phone="width: 100%!important;"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" custom_margin_tablet="30px||||false|false" custom_margin_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"]

The 5Rs is run as a team workshop to deconstruct your product or brand proposition and then decide what elements or assets to re-use, reimagine, reduce, remove or re-inforce.

The ultimate objective is to clearly differentiate your product (or brand) by identifying the unique and ownable functional elements, assets or equities that we can use to commercialize your sustainability goals and commitments.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#0a0a0a" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" border_color_top="gcid-primary-color" border_style_top="dotted" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-primary-color%22:%91%22border_color_top%22%93}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/abstract-texture-background-plama-2000px.jpg" background_position="top_center" max_width="100%" custom_padding="50px||50px||true|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;||" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="|700|||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_2_font="||||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px|30px|false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Testing

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_padding="40px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Using our own fully licensed white label testing platform, we can quickly and efficiently understand which functional design elements, identities, positioning statements, concepts, creative or collateral will resonate best.

This can be programmed in less than a day and results secured in 48 hours - streaming in real-time to an online dashboard so we can instantly see, analyze and review results

This can be done using global panels or ‘synthetically’, using AI generated segments (often best used to assist with internal decision making)

Have a Question?

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="10px|0px|50px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="0px||0px|20px|true|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_font="|700|||||||" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="What does a BPP (Belief, Purpose, Pursuits) framework include in practice?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

It connects your belief, purpose, and pursuits into a clear blueprint that links brand purpose to profit.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you help leadership align on a single purpose statement?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Through facilitated workshops that surface values, tensions, and ambitions — then shape them into a unifying purpose, platform and corporate narrative.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you run in-person workshops, virtual sessions, or both?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Both. We adapt to your team’s needs and location.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What tangible outputs will we walk away with (e.g., positioning statements, messaging)?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Clear articulation of your brand purpose, positioning, archetype messaging strategy and pillars, and strategic / go to market pursuits — usable across culture, brands, and campaigns.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you ensure purpose connects to profit, not just brand messaging?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

We always align your purpose and sustainability commitments with the business strategy and the commercial drivers of your business that create customer utility and value.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_font="|700|||||||" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you adapt frameworks for campaigns vs. company-wide strategy?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

The BPP can scale from company-wide positioning down to campaign-level messaging.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you support internal communications and employee engagement around purpose?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Yes. We help embed purpose and values across organizational culture as well as external brand activations and initiatives.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it take to articulate a brand purpose end-to-end?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Typically 8–12 weeks, depending on scope and number of stakeholders involved.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you share case studies of how Sustain-Agility™ has helped organizations connect sustainability goals to commercial outcomes?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

Yes. Once we have a better understanding of the barriers and drivers within your category we often share case study to help identify potential goals and help build out the best roadmap and approach.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you prevent “purpose-washing” and keep work credible?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" open="off"]

By grounding everything in verifiable data and measurable impact.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" SustainAgility links purpose and profit by integrating brand strategy, culture and operations - commercializing sustainability at speed.

header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="|||0px|false|false"
