header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Close the Gap!

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.5em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="20px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="0px|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="19px" text_font_size_phone="17px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="1.5em" text_line_height_phone="1.4em" text_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

If you're feeling a bit stuck or not seeing any business traction or commercial benefit from investments in sustainability, social impact of CSR -– then the chances are that there's still an intention-action gap. This is how we can help you find, quantify and close it.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="15px" text_line_height="1.4em" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.7)" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px|20px|10px|20px|false|true" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5%22:%91%22border_color_all%22%93}"]

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="80px||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="||||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_line_height="1.1em" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

How it Works

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.5em" min_height="65px" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="20px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="0px|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="19px" text_font_size_phone="17px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="1.5em" text_line_height_phone="1.4em" text_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Finding the intention-action gaps, uncovering key opportunities and defining the job to be done.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

1. FINDING THE GAPS

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

We’ll undertake a 4C landscape assessment (culture, category, consumer and competitor) to understand the business context, gather key insights and competitive intelligence and then qualitatively define where your biggest intention-action gaps actually are.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/gaps-1.jpg" title_text="gaps" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

2. MAPPING THE ECOSYSTEM

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

We’ll conduct interviews, focus groups or ethnographies and map out the ecosystem of key stakeholders - capturing their needs, drivers, expectations and pain points. Then, we’ll engage Gaia (our resident AI) to help identify where key opportunities for paradigm shifts in positioning, differentiation and go to market might exist.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/mapping.jpg" title_text="mapping" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" custom_margin="||5px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

3. QUANTIFICATION

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Once we have a really good understanding of the landscape and your stakeholder ecosystem , we’ll run implicit association testing (IAT) to quantify your biggest intention-action gaps. This mean we can size and prioritize the biggest barriers and drivers for your brand and category and then articulate the propelling problem and job to be done.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/quantification.jpg" title_text="quantification" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" background_color="#000000" Discover how to start by closing the Intention Action Gap from start to finish

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_code disabled_on="on|on|on" module_class="custom-btnn" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" link_option_url="https://landing.mailerlite.com/webforms/landing/a3m1p4" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Have a Question?

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="10px|0px|50px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="0px||0px|20px|true|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="What’s included in a typical landscape or sustainability audit?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

We assess culture, category, consumer, and competitor dynamics — combining external insights with internal interviews to build a hypotheses around the biggest intention-action gaps.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you identify the biggest “intention–action gap” opportunities for a brand?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We use some of the latest neuro and behavioral science based research techniques to size and prioritize them. 

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you use AI tools or human-led research — or both?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both. We often blend AI-powered landscape analysis (through Gaia, our resident AI) combined with expert interviews, ethnographies and custom research.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What kinds of stakeholders do you involve in the discovery process?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We involve leadership, frontline staff, and key external stakeholders to ensure a 360° view.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does a discovery engagement usually take?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Typically 2–6 weeks, depending on scope, complexity and number of markets.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you benchmark us against competitors in our category?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Yes. We map your brand, business and positioning against the key competitors and best-in-class brands in your category.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do we get tangible outputs like reports, dashboards, or workshops?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. You’ll receive a clear overview, supported by data, plus interactive dashboards, reports and then ‘ignition’ workshops to turn insights into action and help define the jobs to be done.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you ensure the insights are actionable, not just theoretical?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We focus on identifying the drivers,  barriers and enablers of change and transformation— so insights translate directly into ideas, innovations or activation opportunities.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can we focus discovery on a single market or campaign rather than the whole business?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Absolutely. Discovery can be scaled to one product, market, or audience.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you use testing methods like Implicit Association Testing (IAT) to validate insights?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. IAT helps uncover unconscious biases that influence behavior — and is one of the most reliable ways to predict purchase intent.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" z_index="5" custom_padding="59px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="20px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_phone="0px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" z_index_tablet="500" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" border_width_bottom="40px" Fashion is not for the faint of heart. It's a way of making a statement and showing the world what you really care about. That’s why Emerging Heroes came to Grounded, a creative boutique agency, to help them clarify their brand purpose and help launch the brand in the volatile fashion marketplace.

item.title: Real Leaders:
item.dc:creator: phil_white
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="40px||40px||true|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_4,1_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_colors_info="{}"]

Real Leaders:

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.26.0" text_text_color="#ffffff" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" global_colors_info="{}"]

Real Leaders needed a way to introduce their new publication as a magazine by CEOs for CEOs to help them see the world differently in order to lead more consciously and purposefully.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text disabled_on="on|on|on" _builder_version="4.26.0" text_text_color="#ffffff" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" disabled="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

Today’s top CEOs are using their business to help support people and the planet. Real Leaders is a publication and platform built to help these CEOs support and inspire each other on this difficult path. Grounded, a Sustainable Creative Agency, to help them clarify their brand purpose and craft a rally cry to entice other leaders to join the mission. Need help articulating your brand purpose?

 

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_button header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

An Impact Agency

That Means Business

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.5em" min_height="45px" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="20px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="0px|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||60px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="19px" text_font_size_phone="17px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="1.5em" text_line_height_phone="1.4em" text_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Measuring impact, reporting on progress and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="15px" text_line_height="1.4em" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.7)" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px|20px|10px|20px|false|true" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="#ff08cc" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-6dafdb64-e9c7-4a62-b89b-31afa2de2f9f%22:%91%22border_color_all%22%93}"]

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale.

  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="80px||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="18px" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

The ‘Flywheel of Impact’ enables any brand, social enterprise or non profit to identify the right partners, facilitate collaboration and then measure the biggest opportunity for triple bottom line impact (people, planet, and profit).

Done well, it can scale partnerships, revenue and impact (so that the ‘money’ generated can continue to power the ‘mission’). The ‘magic’ always comes from a deep understanding of the transformative experience that the people or communities that you serve would like to have.

Your SVP (sustainable value proposition) therefore lies at the intersection of the mission, the money (biggest intention gap ) and the magic (the biggest opportunity for transformation). It can help cross sector partners stay unified around the mission, stay accountable for generating value and help unlock the big idea for community engagement, volunteerism, campaigns and even sustainability reporting. 

 

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image Discover how to create flywheel to drive triple bottom line impact 

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url="https://landing.mailerlite.com/webforms/landing/g7l7y8" url_new_window="on" button_text="Try The Workshop" button_alignment_tablet="center" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="0px|auto|0px|auto|false|false" custom_padding="50px|0px|0px|0px|false|true" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#00aeef" header_3_font="|700|||||||" header_3_text_color="#00aeef" header_5_text_color="#000000" header_5_line_height="1.7em" background_layout="dark" custom_margin="||10px||false|false" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px||||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" global_colors_info="{}"]

Have a Question?

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="10px|0px|50px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="0px||0px|20px|true|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you identify the right partnerships or alliances for impact?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

We analyze your belief, purpose and pursuit along with the barriers and drivers of your audience or the community that you serve  to find the right strategic partners that can help scale revenue and impact.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you help us design a long-term sustainability or purpose roadmap?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. The Flywheel framework supports both near-term activation and long-term strategic planning.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you facilitate introductions to nonprofits, B Corps, or other collaborators?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We have a wide network of mission and values driven partners and collaborators.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What does a Flywheel of Impact engagement include?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

The flywheel of impact helps you to find, activate and then measure your impact at the  intersection between your mission (or your brand purpose),  the money (biggest intention gap ) and the magic (the biggest cultural or community challenge or issue that you can authentically address.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you help brands close the intention–action gap at scale?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

By identifying where their mission, money, and cultural “magic” intersect — and then designing scalable ideas, campaigns or commercial innovations. 

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it typically take to move from pilot to a scaled program?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Often 3–6 months, depending on the number of partnerships and markets.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What ongoing support do you provide after launch?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We offer ongoing consultancy, measurement, and optimization.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you help secure stakeholder buy-in (internal and external)?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Through evidence-based insights and co-created strategies and ideas that build alignment.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you help us design KPIs that track impact as well as growth?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We always track financial, social, and environmental indicators. The flywheel of impact works and gathers momentum by combining multiple bottom line metrics to power the flywheel.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" z_index="5" custom_padding="59px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="20px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_phone="0px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" z_index_tablet="500" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" border_width_bottom="40px" border_color_bottom="#000000" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" collapsed="off" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Activating Brand Purpose

& Sustainability

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="1.5em" width="75.1%" custom_margin="0px||16px||false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_phone="20px||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_padding="0px||14px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="||30px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="||40px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="19px" text_font_size_phone="17px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="1.5em" text_line_height_phone="1.4em" text_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Driving behavior change and purchase intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers - especially at retail.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="15px" text_line_height="1.4em" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.7)" background_layout="dark" custom_padding="20px|20px|10px|20px|false|true" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-fc9dfe85-088c-4afe-bc86-07bf8329f0e5%22:%91%22border_color_all%22%93}"]

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

  • Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
  • Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
  • Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="80px||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="8px||||false|false" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="48px" text_line_height="1.4em" header_font="||||||||" header_font_size="60px" header_line_height="1.1em" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="60px" background_layout="dark" width="100%" max_width="900px" custom_margin="||0px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="||48px|0px|false|false" custom_margin_phone="||0px||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" text_font_size_tablet="40px" text_font_size_phone="40px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height_tablet="60px" header_2_line_height_phone="48px" header_2_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

Brand Activation For Good

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

We like to take a design-sprint based approach to creative development, with the aim of enhancing co-creation and collaboration at every step.

So whether it’s packaging, logos, visual identity systems, marketing collateral, consumer activations or brand experiences, we ensure that it’s always delivered on brand, on budget and at speed - without the need for protracted meetings, rounds of revisions or ivory tower conversations.

All of our playbooks, frameworks, tools and ways of working are based on proprietary research, case studies and decades of consultation with some of the world’s largest brand owners and retailers.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image Just fantastic!

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_margin="30px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/5-star-outline.png" title_text="5-star-outline" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width="35%" width_tablet="35%" width_phone="60%" width_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="24px" text_line_height="1.4em" background_layout="dark" text_font_size_tablet="24px" text_font_size_phone="20px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]

Coupled with the testing, it really brought to light the challenges we are facing and helped define the most impactful way to reach our shoppers through packaging, design and retail activation.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/2-logos.jpg" title_text="2-logos" After each sprint you will have…

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/brand-activation-for-good.png" title_text="brand-activation-for-good" align="center" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" width="80%" custom_padding_tablet="|50%|||false|false" custom_padding_phone="|50%|||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="2_5,3_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="100%" custom_margin="30px||||false|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||flex-wrap: wrap;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/brand-activation-graphic.jpg" title_text="brand-activation-graphic" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" border_width_all="10px" border_color_all="#FFFFFF" global_colors_info="{}"] [/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="align-self: center;||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="28px" text_line_height="1.4em" ul_font_size="22px" ul_line_height="1.5em" background_layout="dark" ul_font_size_tablet="22px" ul_font_size_phone="18px" ul_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"]
  • A Big Idea and activation strategy that maps back to purpose, sustainability strategy and the commercial drivers of your brand and business
  • Identified and prioritized the biggest intention-action gaps along the path to purchase - to drive the right behavior change at the moments that matter for your customers
  • Developed a range of potential designs, ideas, activations and experiences (that can all be tested in less than a week)
  • A commercial selling story and sell-in video to pitch those ideas to customers and key stakeholders
  • A robust tactical plan and toolkit

Have a Question?

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="10px|0px|50px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="0px||0px|20px|true|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="What kinds of campaigns do you typically design (digital, experiential, partnerships)?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Ominchannel retail activations, partnerships, digital campaigns, and experiential programs designed to drive both impact and sales.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you ensure sustainability messaging is commercially effective?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We align sustainability commitments and claims with customer category strategy and shopper purchase drivers.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you create campaign concepts from scratch or build on client ideas?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both. We can originate fresh ideas or collaborate to evolve existing concepts or programs.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you integrate creative with cultural insights and sustainability frameworks?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

By combining insights from our research with proven frameworks like the 5Rs workshop and flywheel of impact

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What deliverables are usually included (assets, toolkits, playbooks)?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Depending on scope: campaign toolkits, creative assets, and playbooks for internal and retail teams to use and deploy. We generally don't handle campaign management and implementation.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it take to develop an activation from strategy to toolkit?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Typically 8–12 weeks, depending on complexity.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you test campaigns before launch to validate messaging?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We often run concept and claims testing using our own white label testing platform to choose the best idea or refine messaging before we move to development or roll-out.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you support retail activation or B2B campaigns as well as consumer-facing ones?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We work across B2B, retail, and direct to consumer driven categories and markets.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you help us design sustainability activations that drive purchase intent at retail?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. Retail Activation for Good if a workshop specifically designed to make sustainable shopping more accessible, aspirational and rewarding at point of purchase.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you collaborate with client agencies or handle full execution in-house?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both — we can lead or integrate with your existing agency partners.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" item.title: PHIL WHITE
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" background_image="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/abstract-texture-background-plama-2000px.jpg" background_enable_video_mp4="off" custom_padding="9%||9%||true|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text disabled_on="off|off|off" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_font="Montserrat|700|||||||" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="64px" text_line_height="78px" header_font="|700|||||||" header_text_align="left" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_font_size="50px" header_line_height="1.2em" header_3_text_align="left" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_orientation="center" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" text_font_size_tablet="52px" text_font_size_phone="38px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height_tablet="64px" text_line_height_phone="40px" text_line_height_last_edited="on|desktop" header_font_size_tablet="42px" header_font_size_phone="35px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" header_line_height_tablet="60px" header_line_height_phone="46px" header_line_height_last_edited="on|phone" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"]

ABOUT US

Phil White

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,3_4" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/phil-bio.jpg" title_text="phil-bio" admin_label="Matt" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_social_media_follow _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_social_media_follow_network social_network="linkedin" url="https://www.linkedin.com/in/philbenjwhite/" icon_color="gcid-secondary-color" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-secondary-color%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93}" follow_button="off" url_new_window="on"]linkedin[/et_pb_social_media_follow_network][/et_pb_social_media_follow][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="18px" text_line_height="30px" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Phil White is Co-Founder and Chief Strategy Officer at Grounded. He specializes in helping clients to discover their biggest intention-action gaps and develop purpose-driven behavior changing campaigns, content, activations and commercial innovations to commercialize sustainability. Over his 30-year career, Phil has worked for some of the world’s most well-known agency networks and brands, including P&G, Unilever, McDonald’s, InBev, Pepsico, General Mills, Nestle, GSK, Starbucks, Coca-Cola, Heineken, Bacardi & Mondelez, to name a few.

Phil has helped PAMPERS & UNICEF successfully eliminate Newborn Tetanus from the world today and won a shelf full of effectiveness awards for his work on Unilever. He has chaired the strategy committee for the American Advertising Agencies Association, and is Co-chair of the B Corp community in Connecticut, He has been voted in the top 100 of the world’s most effective leaders in the CSR and social impact space by Real Leaders, is published by Forbes, Sustainable Brands, Campaign and appears in press conferences to support  State Government Initiatives.  As well as an expert impact speaker, he is also an adjunct professor at Michigan State University for the department of Advertising and PR and an advisor/investor across a portfolio of social enterprise start-ups.

LinkedIn | phil@grounded.world

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
ABOUT US

Phil White

  • Follow

Phil White is Co-Founder and Chief Strategy Officer at Grounded. He specializes in helping clients to discover their biggest intention-action gaps and develop purpose-driven behavior changing campaigns, content, activations and commercial innovations to commercialize sustainability. Over his 30-year career, Phil has worked for some of the world’s most well-known agency networks and brands, including P&G, Unilever, McDonald’s, InBev, Pepsico, General Mills, Nestle, GSK, Starbucks, Coca-Cola, Heineken, Bacardi & Mondelez, to name a few.

Phil has helped PAMPERS & UNICEF successfully eliminate Newborn Tetanus from the world today and won a shelf full of effectiveness awards for his work on Unilever. He has chaired the strategy committee for the American Advertising Agencies Association, and is Co-chair of the B Corp community in Connecticut, He has been voted in the top 100 of the world’s most effective leaders in the CSR and social impact space by Real Leaders, is published by Forbes, Sustainable Brands, Campaign and appears in press conferences to support  State Government Initiatives.  As well as an expert impact speaker, he is also an adjunct professor at Michigan State University for the department of Advertising and PR and an advisor/investor across a portfolio of social enterprise start-ups.

LinkedIn | phil@grounded.world

Articles & Blogs

Browse through the gallery of blogs and articles from Phil.

ABOUT US

Phil White

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,3_4" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Paloma-Jacome-Headshot-Original.png" title_text="Paloma Jacome Headshot Original" admin_label="Matt" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_social_media_follow _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_social_media_follow_network social_network="linkedin" url="https://www.linkedin.com/in/paloma-jacome-bramkamp/" icon_color="gcid-secondary-color" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-secondary-color%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93}" follow_button="off" url_new_window="on"]linkedin[/et_pb_social_media_follow_network][/et_pb_social_media_follow][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="18px" text_line_height="30px" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

 Paloma Jacome is content lead and Junior Strategist at Grounded. With over 8 years of experience at the intersection of business and sustainability, she has launched and led multiple ventures —including ECOAVSOLUTIONS, local sustainable audiovisual production company in Southern California— before bringing her entrepreneurial perspective to client work at Grounded. She holds a Bachelor’s in Entrepreneurship and a Master of Science in Entrepreneurship and Sustainable Innovation from Loyola Marymount University.

Paloma is also an active ambassador and city coordinator for the Los Angeles chapter of Top Tier Impact, organizing events that connect impact founders, investors, and sustainability professionals to collaborate on solving the most pressing challenges of our time.

As part of Grounded’s partnership with rePurpose Global, Paloma represented the agency in the Plastic Reality Project in India, an immersive program designed to experience the scale of plastic pollution firsthand and explore circular solutions addressing the crisis at its source. She is also recently certified in sustainability legislation and regulations for the fashion industry by the Sustainable Fashion School, strengthening her expertise in policy-driven transformation.

Paloma was a core co-author of Grounded’s debut white paper Policy to Profit: How New Rules Can Create Commercial Wins for Fashion—featured in Forbes—and continues to explore how circularity and regulation unlock commercial and societal value.

LinkedIn | paloma@grounded.world

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
ABOUT US

Phil White

  • Follow

 Paloma Jacome is content lead and Junior Strategist at Grounded. With over 8 years of experience at the intersection of business and sustainability, she has launched and led multiple ventures —including ECOAVSOLUTIONS, local sustainable audiovisual production company in Southern California— before bringing her entrepreneurial perspective to client work at Grounded. She holds a Bachelor’s in Entrepreneurship and a Master of Science in Entrepreneurship and Sustainable Innovation from Loyola Marymount University.

Paloma is also an active ambassador and city coordinator for the Los Angeles chapter of Top Tier Impact, organizing events that connect impact founders, investors, and sustainability professionals to collaborate on solving the most pressing challenges of our time.

As part of Grounded’s partnership with rePurpose Global, Paloma represented the agency in the Plastic Reality Project in India, an immersive program designed to experience the scale of plastic pollution firsthand and explore circular solutions addressing the crisis at its source. She is also recently certified in sustainability legislation and regulations for the fashion industry by the Sustainable Fashion School, strengthening her expertise in policy-driven transformation.

Paloma was a core co-author of Grounded’s debut white paper Policy to Profit: How New Rules Can Create Commercial Wins for Fashion—featured in Forbes—and continues to explore how circularity and regulation unlock commercial and societal value.

LinkedIn | paloma@grounded.world

Articles & Blogs

Browse through the gallery of blogs and articles from Paloma.

[/et_pb_blog_extras]

Also featured in…

See below links to other articles, podcast appearances etc.

For potential projects or engagements, feel free to schedule a call.

Discovery Call

If you’re still unsure, submit a contact form.

A member of the team will get back to you within 24 hours. Sales and solution provider messages are automatically sent to spam.

Contact Form

For any other questions, media enquiries or if you’re interested in joining the team, please email us getgrounded@grounded.world

It’s time to get grounded

Contact Us

ABOUT US

Matt Deasy

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,3_4" use_custom_gutter="on" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_4" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://grounded.world/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/mat-bio.jpg" title_text="mat-bio" admin_label="Matt" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_social_media_follow _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_social_media_follow_network social_network="linkedin" url="https://www.linkedin.com/in/matt-deasy/" icon_color="gcid-secondary-color" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" background_color="#FFFFFF" background_enable_color="on" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-secondary-color%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93}" follow_button="off" url_new_window="on"]linkedin[/et_pb_social_media_follow_network][/et_pb_social_media_follow][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_font_size="18px" text_line_height="30px" header_3_font_size="23px" header_3_line_height="1.1em" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Matt Deasy is Business Development Lead at Grounded and an independent consultant, helping purpose-driven brands scale impact with clarity and commercial strength. Matt is a certified ‘B Leader’ - a trained consultant officially recognized by B Lab (the nonprofit behind the B Corp movement) to support companies on their journey toward B Corp certification, a graduate of Harvard Business School’s Sustainable Business Strategy program, and studied the UN Sustainable Development Goals program at the University of Copenhagen.

Matt brings a unique blend of entrepreneurial grit and sustainability expertise to Grounded, has contributed to publications such as Sustainable Times and B Lab Portugal, and is an expert ambassador at Brilliant Ideas Planet, exploring the evolving role of business in addressing global challenges.

Finally, as lead of Grounded Expeditions, Matt designs immersive, impact-driven experiences that connect business leaders with impact solutions. His approach draws on over a decade building and scaling snow and surf businesses across Europe and North Africa, alongside extensive travel to 80+ countries across every continent. These global experiences inform his belief that commercial success and environmental stewardship can—and must—go hand in hand.

Matt continues to explore how brand storytelling, partnerships, and strategy can accelerate the transition to an economy where purpose and profit reinforce each other.

LinkedIn | matt@grounded.world

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
ABOUT US

Matt Deasy

  • Follow

Matt Deasy is Business Development Lead at Grounded and an independent consultant, helping purpose-driven brands scale impact with clarity and commercial strength. Matt is a certified ‘B Leader’ – a trained consultant officially recognized by B Lab (the nonprofit behind the B Corp movement) to support companies on their journey toward B Corp certification, a graduate of Harvard Business School’s Sustainable Business Strategy program, and studied the UN Sustainable Development Goals program at the University of Copenhagen.

Matt brings a unique blend of entrepreneurial grit and sustainability expertise to Grounded, has contributed to publications such as Sustainable Times and B Lab Portugal, and is an expert ambassador at Brilliant Ideas Planet, exploring the evolving role of business in addressing global challenges.

Finally, as lead of Grounded Expeditions, Matt designs immersive, impact-driven experiences that connect business leaders with impact solutions. His approach draws on over a decade building and scaling snow and surf businesses across Europe and North Africa, alongside extensive travel to 80+ countries across every continent. These global experiences inform his belief that commercial success and environmental stewardship can—and must—go hand in hand.

Matt continues to explore how brand storytelling, partnerships, and strategy can accelerate the transition to an economy where purpose and profit reinforce each other.

LinkedIn | matt@grounded.world

Articles & Blogs

Browse through the gallery of blogs and articles from Matt.

[/et_pb_blog_extras]

Also featured in…

See below links to other articles, podcast appearances etc.

For potential projects or engagements, feel free to schedule a call.

Discovery Call

If you’re still unsure, submit a contact form.

A member of the team will get back to you within 24 hours. Sales and solution provider messages are automatically sent to spam.

Contact Form

For any other questions, media enquiries or if you’re interested in joining the team, please email us getgrounded@grounded.world

It’s time to get grounded

Contact Us
We're an award-winning, B Corp boutique marketing agency with global experience in brand strategy, activation and social innovation.

text_line_height__hover_enabled="off|desktop"]

Our Services

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="28px" header_font="|700|||||||" header_font_size="64px" header_line_height="70px" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" module_alignment="center" custom_margin="||||false|true" custom_padding="|10%|30px|10%|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||60px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="|0px|0px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="18px" text_font_size_phone="16px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_orientation_tablet="center" text_orientation_phone="left" text_orientation_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}" text_line_height__hover_enabled="off|desktop"]

Everything we do is designed to move the needle culturally, socially, environmentally and behaviorally - inside and out.  So whether you need to find you biggest intention-action gaps, foster multi-stakeholder collaboration and partnerships, tell your story or commercialize sustainability to generate an ROI  - we can help you articulate purpose, activate your brands and accelerate your impact.

So, our services go wide and deep - from commercial innovation driven workshops and design sprints to custom research, brand identity, packaging and positioning to storytelling, strategic partnerships, sustainability reporting and fully integrated campaigns. 

Scroll over the tiles below to find out more or book a discovery call with one of our founders.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url="https://calendly.com/phil-grounded/getting-grounded-30-mins" url_new_window="on" button_text=" Discovery Call" button_alignment="center" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" button_bg_color="#000000" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}" button_bg_enable_color__hover="on" button_border_color__hover_enabled="on|hover" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|phone" custom_css_main_element_phone="width: 100%;||text-align: center;" button_border_color__hover="#ff08cc" button_bg_color__hover_enabled="on|hover" button_bg_color__hover="#ff08cc"]

[/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" z_index="10" custom_padding="100px||0px||false|false" custom_padding_tablet="80px||||false|false" custom_padding_phone="50px||||false|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" width_tablet="" width_phone="89%" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_padding="|0px||0px|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_font="|700|||||||" header_text_color="#ffffff" header_font_size="40px" header_line_height="1.4em" header_2_font="|700|||||||" header_2_text_align="center" header_2_text_color="#ffffff" header_2_font_size="48px" header_2_line_height="1.4em" header_4_text_color="#ffffff" header_4_line_height="1.4em" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" width="100%" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="100%" width_last_edited="on|phone" custom_margin="||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px|0px|10px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="|0px|||false|false" custom_padding_phone="|0px|0px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" header_font_size_tablet="40px" header_font_size_phone="30px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_font_size_tablet="44px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" header_4_font_size_tablet="16px" header_4_font_size_phone="16px" header_4_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"]

Roll over the tiles to find out more about our services

 

[/et_pb_text][simp_our_approach heading_1="Research" content_1="

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy
" heading_2="Strategy" content_2="

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

  • Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
  • Brand positioning architecture & archetyping
" heading_3="Activation" content_3="

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

  • Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
  • Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
  • Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)
" heading_4="Impact" content_4="

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" module_alignment="center" global_colors_info="{}"]

Services Overview (General FAQs)

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width="100%" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" max_width="1240px" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="50px|20px|50px|20px|true|true" custom_padding_tablet="96px||97px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="104px||105px|20px|false|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it usually take to see tangible results?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||40px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|tablet" border_width_left="1px" border_width_left_tablet="0px" border_width_left_phone="0px" border_width_left_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you scope projects in phases to match different budgets and timelines?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Absolutely. Many of our clients start with a pilot or workshop, then expand once they see results.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.5"
