wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Our Services
Everything we do is designed to move the needle culturally, socially, environmentally and behaviorally – inside and out.  So whether you need to find you biggest intention-action gaps, foster multi-stakeholder collaboration and partnerships, tell your story or commercialize sustainability to generate an ROI  – we can help you articulate purpose, activate your brands and accelerate your impact.
So, our services go wide and deep – from commercial innovation driven workshops and design sprints to custom research, brand identity, packaging and positioning to storytelling, strategic partnerships, sustainability reporting and fully integrated campaigns. 
Scroll over the tiles below to find out more or book a discovery call with one of our founders.
Discovery Call
Roll over the tiles to find out more about our services
 

Research

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy

Find Out More

Strategy

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
Brand positioning architecture & archetyping

Find Out More

Activation

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)

Find Out More

Impact

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

Sustainability & impact reporting
Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership

Find Out More
  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Good growth drivers & go to market strategy
Contact Us
  • Corporate, brand & social purpose
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, narrative and storytelling
  • Brand positioning, architecture & archetyping
Contact Us
  • Brand identity, packaging & design
  • Campaigns, events, experiences and key stakeholder engagement
  • Retail activation (selling stories customer Journeys, omnichannel toolkits, loyalty marketing and tactical plans)
Contact Us
  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial and non-profit partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
Contact Us

Flexible, Fluid & Fearless.
 This is who we are and how we work. Hover over the tiles to find out more.
Pop Up
Pop Up
We do speaking engagements, present thought leadership at conferences and events and get the ball rolling by facilitating one day design sprints, immersions, brainstorms and workshops.
Plug-in
Plug-inWe can operate as part of your team or lead an IAT. We can even help you build and augment your in-house capabilities – without the need for big agency fees or expenses.
Play Thru
Play ThruWe can also make it totally turnkey and  provide a full service  agency solution –  from strategy, creative, tactical planning, and toolkits to strategic partnerships, PR and impact reporting.
Services Overview (General FAQs)
How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?
Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.
What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?
We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.
How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?
We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.
How long does it usually take to see tangible results?
Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.
Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?
Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.
How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?
We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.
What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?
We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.
How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?
Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.
Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?
Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.
Can you scope projects in phases to match different budgets and timelines?
Absolutely. Many of our clients start with a pilot or workshop, then expand once they see results.
It’s time to get grounded
Contact Us
Brand Marketing Agency Services | Grounded World
Grounded World is a B-Corp certified brand marketing agency that can help you articulate purpose, activate your brand + accelerate impact.

Mule Men: Relief Delivered

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" text_text_color="#ffffff" text_font_size="17px" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" global_colors_info="{}"]

Mule Men exists to deliver disaster relief, because it’s only relief when it gets delivered. They needed a clear and compelling visual identity and brand story to reflect their no nonsense approach to logistics and humanitarian relief - to differentiate themselves from other larger relief organizations and reflect the unique attitude, ethics and personalities of the mulement themselves, many of whom are veterans.

70% of Americans suffer from a poor night's sleep — driving many people to some crazy extremes to try and find it. Like headstands before bed, blowing bubbles and breathing through their left nostril! But the solution is so much simpler. Thanks to our human proxy, Peanut the dachshund, we help people ditch the crazy bedtime hacks — and get their best night’s sleep every night with a Tempur-Pedic® at Ashley.

item.title: The Lycra Company: Keep in the Loop with LYCRA
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="40px||40px||true|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" header_line_height="1.1em" sticky_enabled="0"]

The Lycra Company: Keep in the Loop with LYCRA

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="17px" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

With fashion and apparel becoming one of the top polluters on our planet, The LYCRA Company was stepping up with a new sustainability strategy and a call to action — to keep in the loop with LYCRA. It was an open invitation for the apparel industry to join them in their efforts to change the cycle and create a more circular industry.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.16" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.16" _module_preset="default" item.title: LYCRA + QIRA: Farm to Fiber VR Tour
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="40px||40px||true|false" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" header_line_height="1.1em" sticky_enabled="0"]

Lycra + QIRA: Farm to Fiber VR Tour

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="17px" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

If seeing is believing, than walking the farm is proof. In order to keep the excitement building and show textile & apparel companies the impact of switching to new renewable LYCRA® fiber, we needed them to experience the innovation first hand. It would be hard -and unsustainable!- to bring everyone to an Iowa farm, so we used the magic of VR to bring the farm to them.

item.title: LYCRA + QIRA: Farmer Docuseries

item.title: Slumberland + TSI: Shopaphobia (60)
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" inner_shadow="on" _builder_version="4.16" background_color="#000000" inner_module_alignment="center" custom_margin="0px||||false|false" custom_padding="40px||40px||false|false" z_index_tablet="500" border_color_top="#00aeef" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" header_line_height="1.1em" sticky_enabled="0"]

Slumberland + TSI: Shopaphobia

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" text_text_color="#ffffff" text_font_size="17px" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" global_colors_info="{}"]

People would rather go to the dentist than shop for a mattress. They are suffering Mattress-shop-a-phobia— To have an extreme fear or aversion to shopping for a mattress. By diagnosing the ailment we could start suggesting a cure and differentiate Slumberland as the antithesis to other mattress retailers. We also positioned the sales force as empathetic Sleep Counselors - uniquely equipped to guide shoppers to the ideal TSI solution that solves their specific sleep problem. Shoppers could finally stop stressing and start sleeping with Slumberland.

Whistlepig + Pit Viper: The SummerStock Games

Celebrating a new solar powered whiskey that’s so bright you’ll need shades. WhistlePig and Pit Viper teamed up to take the season by the tail, ham it up, and and free pour a glass to our favorite star - the sun. Proud to have reached 100% solar power, they created a sun-toasted, summer-friendly whiskey to celebrate. Afterall, the best way to save the planet is to have a better party than those destroying it! Summerstock whiskey in hand they grabbed their PitViper glasses and invited pigs and people everywhere to sip in style through the solstice and beyond.

Nutrifresh, a food prepatory brand, was expanding into cooking, health & fitness and needed a brand architecture and narrative to share this new vision.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text disabled_on="on|on|on" _builder_version="4.26.0" text_text_color="#ffffff" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" disabled="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

The Nutrifresh brand was expanding beyond food storage into fitness and wellness products and they needed a new brand identity and brand purpose that embraced this evolution. Grounded, a boutique marketing agency, helped them articulate their purpose and architecture the brand and communicate this news to retail partners. See how our Boutique Marketing Agency can bring your brands to life.

1 in 5 children come from a food insecure household. Unilever wanted to help change that. They needed a Creative Boutique Agency to put a hidden camera on hunger. With a creative spin on in-store sampling, the brand activation created instant empathy for hungry children. The campaign not only drove purchases, but also donations to help fight hunger in their local communities.

item.title: ReUnited States:
item.dc:creator: phil_white
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" inner_shadow="on" _builder_version="4.16" background_color="#000000" inner_module_alignment="center" custom_margin="0px||||false|false" custom_padding="40px||40px||false|false" z_index_tablet="500" border_color_top="#00aeef" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_4,1_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_colors_info="{}"]

ReUnited States:

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" text_text_color="#ffffff" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" global_colors_info="{}"]

At a time when America is ripping apart at the seams, we needed to bring awarenss to The Reunited States documentary in order to help close the divide. The movie follows the unsung heroes on the difficult journey of bridging our political and racial divides.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text disabled_on="on|on|on" _builder_version="4.26.0" text_text_color="#ffffff" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" disabled="on" global_colors_info="{}"]

Whether it’s social, political, cultural or economical, America is becoming more and more divided. Therefore the documentary, The Reunited States, was coming out at an opportune time. They needed a social impact agency to help them position the film to partners and supporters in order to get the message out. Do you need help creating awareness of your social impact marketing?

Our Services

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" text_font_size="20px" text_line_height="28px" header_font="|700|||||||" header_font_size="64px" header_line_height="70px" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" module_alignment="center" custom_margin="||||false|true" custom_padding="|10%|30px|10%|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="||60px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="|0px|0px|0px|false|true" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" text_font_size_tablet="18px" text_font_size_phone="16px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_orientation_tablet="center" text_orientation_phone="left" text_orientation_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}" text_line_height__hover_enabled="off|desktop"]

Everything we do is designed to move the needle culturally, socially, environmentally and behaviorally - inside and out.  So whether you need to find you biggest intention-action gaps, foster multi-stakeholder collaboration and partnerships, tell your story or commercialize sustainability to generate an ROI  - we can help you articulate purpose, activate your brands and accelerate your impact.

So, our services go wide and deep - from commercial innovation driven workshops and design sprints to custom research, brand identity, packaging and positioning to storytelling, strategic partnerships, sustainability reporting and fully integrated campaigns. 

Scroll over the tiles below to find out more or book a discovery call with one of our founders.

Roll over the tiles to find out more about our services

 

[/et_pb_text][simp_our_approach heading_1="Research" content_1="

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy
" heading_2="Strategy" content_2="

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

  • Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
  • Brand positioning architecture & archetyping
" heading_3="Activation" content_3="

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

  • Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
  • Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
  • Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)
" heading_4="Impact" content_4="

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" module_alignment="center" global_colors_info="{}"]

We can also make it totally turnkey and  provide a full service  agency solution -  from strategy, creative, tactical planning, and toolkits to strategic partnerships, PR and impact reporting. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_code module_class="show-arrow" _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_css_main_element_tablet="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||" custom_css_main_element_phone="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||"][/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" z_index="5" custom_padding="59px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="20px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_phone="0px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" z_index_tablet="500" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" border_width_bottom="40px" border_color_bottom="#000000" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover_enabled="off|desktop"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font_size="30px" header_2_line_height="1.1em" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Services Overview (General FAQs)

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width="100%" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" max_width="1240px" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="50px|20px|50px|20px|true|true" custom_padding_tablet="96px||97px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="104px||105px|20px|false|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it usually take to see tangible results?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||40px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|tablet" border_width_left="1px" border_width_left_tablet="0px" border_width_left_phone="0px" border_width_left_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Our Services
Everything we do is designed to move the needle culturally, socially, environmentally and behaviorally – inside and out.  So whether you need to find you biggest intention-action gaps, foster multi-stakeholder collaboration and partnerships, tell your story or commercialize sustainability to generate an ROI  – we can help you articulate purpose, activate your brands and accelerate your impact.
So, our services go wide and deep – from commercial innovation driven workshops and design sprints to custom research, brand identity, packaging and positioning to storytelling, strategic partnerships, sustainability reporting and fully integrated campaigns. 
Scroll over the tiles below to find out more or book a discovery call with one of our founders.
Discovery Call
Roll over the tiles to find out more about our services
 

Research

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy

Find Out More

Strategy

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
Brand positioning architecture & archetyping

Find Out More

Activation

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)

Find Out More

Impact

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

Sustainability & impact reporting
Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership

Find Out More
  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Good growth drivers & go to market strategy
Contact Us
  • Corporate, brand & social purpose
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, narrative and storytelling
  • Brand positioning, architecture & archetyping
Contact Us
  • Brand identity, packaging & design
  • Campaigns, events, experiences and key stakeholder engagement
  • Retail activation (selling stories customer Journeys, omnichannel toolkits, loyalty marketing and tactical plans)
Contact Us
  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial and non-profit partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
Contact Us

Not quite right… need to do something else?

Click on the most relevant tag to reveal the roadmap. You can expand each of the four phases to see each step. You may not need all of them…but at least you can see the full picture.

Leave us your Company email address (so we know that you are real) and your roadmap will be revealed!

Flexible, Fluid & Fearless.
 This is who we are and how we work. Hover over the tiles to find out more.
Pop Up
Pop Up
We do speaking engagements, present thought leadership at conferences and events and get the ball rolling by facilitating one day design sprints, immersions, brainstorms and workshops.
Plug-in
Plug-inWe can operate as part of your team or lead an IAT. We can even help you build and augment your in-house capabilities – without the need for big agency fees or expenses.
Play Thru
Play ThruWe can also make it totally turnkey and  provide a full service  agency solution –  from strategy, creative, tactical planning, and toolkits to strategic partnerships, PR and impact reporting.
Services Overview (General FAQs)
How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?
Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.
What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?
We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.
How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?
We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.
How long does it usually take to see tangible results?
Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.
Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?
Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.
How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?
We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.
What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?
We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.
How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?
Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.
Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?
Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.
Can you scope projects in phases to match different budgets and timelines?
Absolutely. Many of our clients start with a pilot or workshop, then expand once they see results.
It’s time to get grounded
Contact Us
Grounded World is a B-Corp certified brand marketing agency that can help you articulate purpose, activate your brand + accelerate impact.
Brand Marketing Agency Services | Grounded World

We can also make it totally turnkey and  provide a full service  agency solution -  from strategy, creative, tactical planning, and toolkits to strategic partnerships, PR and impact reporting. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_code module_class="show-arrow" _builder_version="4.18.0" _module_preset="default" custom_css_main_element="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|desktop" custom_css_main_element_tablet="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||" custom_css_main_element_phone="position: absolute;||right: 40px;||bottom: 40px;||"][/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" background_color="#000000" background_enable_image="off" z_index="5" custom_padding="59px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_tablet="20px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" custom_padding_phone="0px|20px|0px|20px|false|true" z_index_tablet="500" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px" border_width_top="40px" border_color_top="#000000" border_width_bottom="40px" border_color_bottom="#000000" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover_enabled="off|desktop"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_2_font_size="30px" header_2_line_height="1.1em" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

Services Overview (General FAQs)

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" custom_padding_last_edited="on|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_enable_image="off" width="100%" width_tablet="100%" width_phone="" width_last_edited="on|phone" max_width="1240px" custom_margin="0px|auto||auto|false|false" custom_padding="50px|20px|50px|20px|true|true" custom_padding_tablet="96px||97px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="104px||105px|20px|false|false" custom_css_main_element="border-radius: 4px;" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How long does it usually take to see tangible results?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.4" background_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" custom_padding="|||40px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="|||0px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|tablet" border_width_left="1px" border_width_left_tablet="0px" border_width_left_phone="0px" border_width_left_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_accordion closed_toggle_text_color="#FFFFFF" closed_toggle_background_color="#000000" icon_color="#ee2a7b" use_icon_font_size="on" icon_font_size="20px" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" toggle_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0px||0px||false|false" custom_padding="0px||0px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="right" border_width_all="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_accordion_item title="How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?" open="on" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||"]

We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title="Can you scope projects in phases to match different budgets and timelines?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" body_text_color="#000000" body_font_size="15px" body_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="||3px||false|false" custom_padding="||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}" toggle_level="h5" toggle_font="|700|||||||" open="off"]

Absolutely. Many of our clients start with a pilot or workshop, then expand once they see results.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.23.1" Our Services
 Everything we do is designed to move the needle culturally, socially and behaviorally – inside and out.
So, our services go wide and deep – from commercial innovation driven workshops and design sprints to custom research, brand identity, packaging and positioning to storytelling, reporting and fully integrated campaigns. 
Scroll over the tiles below to find out more or book a discovery call with one of our founders.
Discovery Call
Roll over the tiles to find out more about our services
 

Research

Assessing culture and the competitive landscape to find the intention-action gaps.

Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
Ecosystem mapping, need states, category growth drivers & go to market strategy

Find Out More

Strategy

Connecting the ‘why’ of purpose to the ‘way’ of profit to tell your sustainability story and drive innovation.

Corporate, brand and social purpose articulation
Sustainability strategy, marketing, corporate narrative, storytelling and innovation sprints
Brand positioning architecture & archetyping

Find Out More

Activation

Driving behavior change and intent at the moments that matter for colleagues, customers and consumers.

Brand identity, packaging, websites & design
Content, video, advertising, campaigns, events and experiences
Commerce (customer journeys, selling stories, brand and retail activation and tactical toolkits)

Find Out More

Impact

Measuring impact, reporting on progress sparking engagement and facilitating collaboration and partnerships at scale

Sustainability & impact reporting
Commercial, non-profit and pre-competitive partnerships
Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership

Find Out More
  • Culture, category, competitor and consumer landscape assessments
  • Intent-to-action gap research and analysis
  • Good growth drivers & go to market strategy
Contact Us
  • Corporate, brand & social purpose
  • Sustainability strategy, marketing, narrative and storytelling
  • Brand positioning, architecture & archetyping
Contact Us
  • Brand identity, packaging & design
  • Campaigns, events, experiences and key stakeholder engagement
  • Retail activation (selling stories customer Journeys, omnichannel toolkits, loyalty marketing and tactical plans)
Contact Us
  • Sustainability & impact reporting
  • Commercial and non-profit partnerships
  • Collaboration training, action labs, design sprints, speaking engagements and thought leadership
Contact Us

Flexible, Fluid & Fearless.
 This is who we are and how we work. Hover over the tiles to find out more.
Pop Up
Pop Up
We do speaking engagements, present thought leadership at conferences and events and get the ball rolling by facilitating one day design sprints, immersions, brainstorms and workshops.
Plug-in
Plug-inWe can operate as part of your team or lead an IAT. We can even help you build and augment your in-house capabilities – without the need for big agency fees or expenses.
Play Thru
Play ThruWe can also make it totally turnkey and  provide a full service  agency solution –  from strategy, creative, tactical planning, and toolkits to strategic partnerships, PR and impact reporting.
Services Overview (General FAQs)
How do you tailor your approach for different types of organizations (startups, corporates, nonprofits)?
Every engagement is bespoke. But we tend to adapt our core teams, tools, frameworks and approaches to the size, budget and ambitions of your organization — from research, strategy, lean startups and design sprints to multi-market campaigns, activations or corporate programs and partnerships.
What does a typical engagement with Grounded look like from start to finish?
We run design sprints, brainstorms and workshops to inspire teams and get the ball rolling; We can operate as part of your team to build strategic and creative capacity — or even augment your in-house capabilities without the need for big agency fees or expenses; or we can make it totally turnkey by providing a full service, fully integrated boutique agency solution end-to-end. Most projects begin with some kind of discovery or research (e.g. landscape assessment insights or audits), move into strategy and articulation (e.g. brand purpose and positioning), and then activation( e.g. creative, campaigns, production or partnerships). Each roadmap is tailored to your goals.
How do you measure the impact of your work beyond traditional marketing metrics?
We always track triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and profit — alongside typical  brand performance KPIs, so you can see both commercial and social returns.
How long does it usually take to see tangible results?
Some clients see early wins within weeks (e.g. campaign engagement), while deeper, systemic, cultural or commercial partnership based innovations and  impact tend to build  over months. Our phased approach  stays fully transparent and accountable to whatever goals are set.
Do you offer one-off projects or only longer-term partnerships?
Both. We run one-day design sprints and workshops,  to quick turn projects and engagement to ongoing multi-year retainers. Many of our clients start small and then scale with us, as the ROI proves out.
How do you integrate with our internal team and existing partners?
We can happily embed ourselves to work alongside your team, partner agencies, and key stakeholders. Collaboration and co-creation is core to how we like to work.
What makes Grounded different from other brand and sustainability agencies?
We don’t just do creative, tell stories or produce content. Everything we do starts with understanding the biggest intention- action gaps and then figuring how we can close those gaps to better connect purpose to profit.  Our proprietary tools like the BPP, Sustain-Agility, and Flywheel of Impact ensure sustainability drives commercial value and triple bottom line impact.
How flexible are your services if our priorities change during a project?
Very. Our frameworks are modular, and remuneration is always based upon time-bound deliverables.
Do you work with international teams and global campaigns?
Yes. We  work with global enterprise level brands, retailers and non-profits.
Can you scope projects in phases to match different budgets and timelines?
Absolutely. Many of our clients start with a pilot or workshop, then expand once they see results.
It’s time to get grounded
Contact Us
Brand Marketing Agency Services | Grounded World
Grounded World is a B-Corp certified brand marketing agency that can help you articulate purpose, activate your brand + accelerate impact.

What does a multi-award winning creative impact agency do, exactly? Well, we use the power of storytelling and ideas to change the world - because they're the only things that ever have.

And we like making them BIG, GOOD, FAST! Big ideas that change behavior and drive good growth - delivered at speed.

So, if you feel the urgency to act and you can imagine a better world, then join us. Because we’re hellbent on creating one.

item.title: Slumberland + TSI: Shopaphobia (60)
item.dc:creator: andrew
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" inner_shadow="on" _builder_version="4.16" background_color="#000000" inner_module_alignment="center" custom_margin="0px||||false|false" custom_padding="40px||40px||false|false" z_index_tablet="500" border_color_top="#00aeef" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_colors_info="{}"]

Slumberland + TSI: Shopaphobia

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" text_text_color="#ffffff" text_font_size="17px" vertical_offset_tablet="0" horizontal_offset_tablet="0" custom_margin="||30px||false|false" z_index_tablet="0" text_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" text_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" link_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" link_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ul_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ul_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" ol_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" ol_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" quote_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" quote_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_2_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_2_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_3_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_3_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_4_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_4_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_5_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_5_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" header_6_text_shadow_horizontal_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_vertical_length_tablet="0px" header_6_text_shadow_blur_strength_tablet="1px" box_shadow_horizontal_tablet="0px" box_shadow_vertical_tablet="0px" box_shadow_blur_tablet="40px" box_shadow_spread_tablet="0px" global_colors_info="{}"]

People would rather go to the dentist than shop for a mattress. They are suffering Mattress-shop-a-phobia— To have an extreme fear or aversion to shopping for a mattress. By diagnosing the ailment we could start suggesting a cure and differentiate Slumberland as the antithesis to other mattress retailers. We also positioned the sales force as empathetic Sleep Counselors - uniquely equipped to guide shoppers to the ideal TSI solution that solves their specific sleep problem. Shoppers could finally stop stressing and start sleeping with Slumberland.
